home.homepageTitle: Experience the next generation of indie games
home.homepageAboutUsText: We are two brothers who have been gaming together since the Super Nintendo and PlayStation 1 & 2 era. We played Megaman X series, Castlevania SotN, Super Metroid, Aero Fighters, Guitar Hero and other classics all day back then! After years working as web programmer and web designer, we decided to start making games in the style we love to play: challenging and fun!

curation.title: Specialized Curation

gamesPage.noGames: No games found for this genre.
gamesPage.title: Games List
gamesPage.subtitle: Explore our curated selection of amazing indie games

typomancer.description: Run, jump and type words to cast spells and help your typing mage disinfect TyWorld from slime monsters! Be prepared to type a lot, as typing will allow you to refill your quill and control the universe around you!

tyfortress.description: Build towers, type phrases and words to protect the last human stronghold against robots! Build and upgrade towers that will help while you destroy robots by typing words! Oh, and don't forget to quickly type the phrases that appear to collect resources and build towers.

tybot-invasion.description: Quickly type words to destroy robots, move across lanes, and destroy waves of enemies in this robotic invasion that blends typing and 'Runner'! The future of Robworld is in your hands, will you be fast enough to destroy the robots?

smashing-spirits.description: Face Spartans on Brazil Island with aggressive boxing combos in this insanely fast fighting-platformer! Play as Aiyra, an indigenous boxer caught in the middle of a conflict between her own people and foreigners from across the ocean.

neon-ships.description: Shoot enemies while typing pop culture phrases to destroy them with your special laser attack! This is a classic Shoot'em up game with a typing twist! We challenge you to dodge all the shots and destroy all the enemies!

kings-bullseye.description: Shoot Chess pieces! The king is tired of being protected, so he's taking out the enemies himself! King Bullseye is a 'target shooting' game where the enemies are chess pieces; you'll have to think and act fast to prioritize the pieces that will hit the king first!

akuma-bloodrain.description: As the ninja Akiji, you will blast and slash through hordes of akumas/yokais attacking your Japanese village. Move quickly through the arena by climbing and boosting, leaving a trail of blood and demon parts wherever you go!

sniper-ships.description: Dodge bullets and click to destroy enemies with your sniper shot! This is a classic 'ship game' mixed with a traditional shooter! We challenge you to dodge thousands of bullets while aiming and taking down enemy ships and bosses!

spooky-typing.description: Be prepared to dodge sharp elements and type words to eliminate ghosts. Can you do it fast enough to stop the ghost infestation around the world?
